greeting: Welcome to Zara's Closet! 👗 We sell ankara dresses, co-ord sets, and ready-to-wear outfits. What are you looking for today?
delivery_info: We deliver within Abuja for ₦1,500. Outside Abuja via courier, fee depends on location.
payment_info: Payment via bank transfer or card on Paystack link after order confirmation.

products.name: Ankara Print Dress
products.description: Beautiful ankara print dress, available in sizes S-XL
